'''Garil Volune''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] man who lived on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] and one of the delegates to the [[Unity Council]]. He was not present at the official [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] greeting on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Instead, he participated in a meeting in the garden of the [[Kandah]] residence, which convinced those present to support the accession of Ansion to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. However, Volune was loyal to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and urged the Jedi to be given more time to settle the Alwarich affair. During the vote, he voted, like most delegates, for remaining in the Republic.
